hypothesis: If MACE, NequIP, and ViSNet are implemented in JAX with XLA compilation and trained on SPICE2, then 1 ns protein molecular dynamics on H100 GPUs will run with lower wall-clock time per step than Torch+ASE baselines while maintaining the same validation energy/force errors because XLA compilation and a gated, species-dependent MACE architecture reduce inference overhead without sacrificing model accuracy.
